scripts.dev: concurrently -n portal,api,operator,monitoring,simulator -c cyan,blue,green,magenta,yellow "npm run dev:portal" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:operator" "npm run dev:monitoring" "npm run dev:simulator"
scripts.setup: docker compose up -d && npm run build -w @suv/shared && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
